## Congressman Josh Gottheimer Discloses Sales of Alibaba and Nintendo Stock

Congressional disclosures carry no fundamental signal for BABA's business; noted purely for completeness given the day's separate 11% BABA move on China AI sentiment.

- Congressional stock-sale disclosure names BABA and Nintendo among holdings sold.
- This is a routine STOCK Act disclosure; no business or fundamental news attached.
- No dollar amounts or quantities are specified in the headline.
